title: jasminum calcareum
intro: Jasminum calcareum, also known as the limestone jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to India and Sri Lanka, characterized by its sweet fragrance and white, star-shaped flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Jasminum calcareum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote well-being and alleviate various health issues.
